headline: Canadian Derivatives Clearing Corporation Announces Inaugural Subscription of Secured General Collateral Notes (SGC Notes)
summary: Bank of Montreal (BMO), the first eligible subscribing bank, issued the first SGC Notes Moody's Ratings (Moody's) assigned a Prime-1 (sf) rating to the Series BMO-521 notes Bank of Canada announced the addition of SGC Notes as eligible collateral under its Standing Liquidity Facility (SLF), with the intent to support the development of this new marketToronto, Ontario--(Newsfile Corp. - July 2, 2026) - Canadian Derivatives Clearing Corporation (CDCC), the Central Clearing Counterparty (CCP) for..
